name: HIPAA Compliance
description: By MEOK AI Labs -- Automates HIPAA healthcare compliance assessment. Evaluate Administrative, Physical, and Technical safeguards, check PHI handling, generate BAA templates, and verify breach notification compliance.

tools.name: assess_hipaa_compliance
tools.description: Evaluate against HIPAA Administrative, Physical, and Technical safeguards

tools.name: check_phi_handling
tools.description: Check Protected Health Information handling compliance

tools.name: generate_baa
tools.description: Generate a Business Associate Agreement template

tools.name: breach_notification_check
tools.description: Check breach notification compliance against 45/60-day rules

tools.name: minimum_necessary_check
tools.description: Evaluate data minimization per HIPAA Minimum Necessary Rule
